name: aina-skill
description: Turn one request into a full product package — a braindoc, SOW, PRD, dev notes, security/readiness reviews, marketing, and ops runbook, plus a working codebase — all generated by YOUR local Claude. Output as a folder, zip, or GitHub repo.

engine.title: Engine
engine.description: Who runs the pipeline stages. 'local' = your Claude (no API key). 'openrouter' = offload bulk persona work to OpenRouter models.

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API key
openrouter_api_key.description: Only needed when engine=openrouter. Used for the cheaper/parallel persona calls.

output_mode.title: Output mode
output_mode.description: folder = leave files on disk · zip = also produce a .zip · git-repo = create + push a GitHub repo (needs gh auth).

github_org.title: GitHub org (git-repo mode)
github_org.description: Org/owner to create the repo in. Leave blank for your personal account.

deploy_target.title: Deploy target
deploy_target.description: none = code + docs only (default). vps = ship a FastAPI app to your own server over SSH. vercel = deploy a Next app.

vps_host.title: VPS host (deploy_target=vps)
vps_host.description: user@host of a Docker-capable server you control. Only used when deploy_target=vps.
